series_metadata.series_description: Documents entire investigation process, including sexual abuse investigations, describing the facts found while conducting an investigation involving an employee or offender''s alleged violation of policy, procedure, or Ohio Revised Code

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 10 years after inmate has reached final release, expiration of sentence, death, or 10 years after employee is no longer employed by the agency. ; Electronic: Retain 10 years after inmate has reached final release, expiration of sentence, death, or 10 years after employee is no longer employed by the agency., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
